extName.description: Extension name shown in stores and the browser toolbar.

extDescription.message: Export your Claude conversations as Markdown, PDF, Word, RTF and plain text — fully in your browser.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in stores and the extensions page.

popupTitle.description: Heading at the top of the popup.

statusProbing.description: Shown briefly while the popup asks the page what it is.

unsupportedHeading.description: Heading when the active tab is not a claude.ai page.

unsupportedBody.message: Hardcopy works on claude.ai conversations. Open a conversation on claude.ai, then open this popup again.
unsupportedBody.description: Explainer when the active tab is not a claude.ai page.

staleTabHeading.description: Heading when the tab is on claude.ai but Hardcopy cannot reach it.

staleTabBody.message: Hardcopy can't reach this page yet — the tab may have been open since before Hardcopy was installed. Reload the tab, then open this popup again.
staleTabBody.description: Explainer when the tab is on claude.ai but the content script is not loaded.

noConversationHeading.description: Heading when the claude.ai tab has no conversation open.

noConversationBody.message: This tab is on claude.ai, but no conversation is open. Open the conversation you want to export, then try again.
noConversationBody.description: Explainer when the claude.ai tab has no conversation open.

loggedOutHeading.description: Heading when the claude.ai session is not authenticated.

loggedOutBody.message: Log in to claude.ai in this tab, then open this popup again.
loggedOutBody.description: Explainer when the claude.ai session is not authenticated.

untitledConversation.description: Placeholder title when the open conversation has no readable title.

statusExporting.description: Progress label and live announcement while an export runs.

successHeading.description: Heading of the success banner after an export finishes.

savedAnnouncement.description: Screen-reader announcement after a successful export. $1 is the filename.

successDegraded.message: This file was built from the rendered page instead of the claude.ai API, so parts of the conversation may be missing. The warnings below list what could not be recovered.
successDegraded.description: Note on the success banner when the export came from the DOM fallback.

warningsSummary.description: Disclosure label for export warnings. $1 is the number of warnings.

failedAnnouncement.description: Screen-reader announcement after a failed export. $1 is the failure message.

technicalDetail.description: Disclosure label for the technical detail of a failure.

exportNoResponse.message: claude.ai didn't respond — reload the tab and try again.
exportNoResponse.description: Failure message when the page never answered the export request.

formatLegend.description: Legend of the format radio group.

formatMarkdown.description: Label of the Markdown format option.

formatText.description: Label of the plain-text format option.

formatRtf.description: Label of the RTF format option.

formatDocx.description: Label of the Word format option.

formatPdf.description: Label of the PDF format option.

includeLegend.description: Legend of the include-options checkbox group.

optionArtifacts.description: Checkbox label: include artifact content snapshots.

optionAttachments.description: Checkbox label: include attachments and uploaded files.

optionMetadata.description: Checkbox label: include the conversation header (title, created/updated dates).

branchesLegend.description: Legend of the branches radio group.

branchCurrent.description: Radio label: export only the branch claude.ai currently shows.

branchAll.description: Radio label: export every branch of an edited conversation.

exportButton.description: Label of the primary export button.

disclaimer.message: Hardcopy is an independent open-source project, not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic. Claude is a trademark of Anthropic, PBC.
disclaimer.description: Non-affiliation disclaimer (ADR 0004). Translate the sentence but keep its meaning exact; 'Hardcopy', 'Anthropic', 'Claude' and 'Anthropic, PBC' are proper names.

optionsTitle.description: Heading and document title of the options page.

optionsIntro.message: These settings are shared with the popup — changes here apply the next time you open it, and changes made in the popup show up here.
optionsIntro.description: Introductory sentence at the top of the options page.

optionsFormatLegend.description: Legend of the default-format radio group on the options page.

filenameLegend.description: Legend of the filename-template section on the options page.

filenameTemplateLabel.description: Label of the filename template text input.

filenameTemplateHelp.message: Placeholders: {title} is the conversation title, {date} is the date (YYYY-MM-DD), {ext} is the file extension.
filenameTemplateHelp.description: Helper text under the filename template input. Keep the literal placeholders {title}, {date} and {ext} untranslated.

filenamePreviewLabel.description: Label preceding the live filename preview.

filenamePreviewSampleTitle.description: Example conversation title used in the filename preview.

filenameTemplateErrorEmpty.description: Validation message when the filename template is empty. Keep the literal placeholders untranslated.

filenameTemplateErrorUnknownPlaceholder.message: $1 is not a placeholder Hardcopy knows. Use {title}, {date} or {ext}.
filenameTemplateErrorUnknownPlaceholder.description: Validation message for an unknown placeholder in the filename template. $1 is the offending placeholder, e.g. {foo}. Keep the literal placeholders untranslated.

filenameTemplateErrorUnbalanced.message: Braces must come in matched pairs — use {title}, {date} or {ext}.
filenameTemplateErrorUnbalanced.description: Validation message when the filename template has a stray { or }. Keep the literal placeholders untranslated.

filenameResetButton.description: Button that restores the default filename template.

savedIndicator.description: Brief indicator (and screen-reader announcement) after a settings change is persisted.

resetHeading.description: Heading of the reset section on the options page.

resetAllButton.description: Button that resets every Hardcopy setting to its default.

resetAllConfirm.message: Reset all Hardcopy settings to their defaults?
resetAllConfirm.description: Confirmation prompt before resetting all settings.

resetAllDone.description: Indicator and announcement after all settings were reset.

aboutHeading.description: Heading of the about section on the options page.

aboutVersion.description: Version line in the about section. $1 is the extension version.

aboutPrivacyLink.description: Link to Hardcopy's privacy policy on GitHub.
